name: Train-Fixed-Best
strengths: One immutable actuator selected without test context
selection_reason: Primary lower comparator for controller value

name: Associative-Query-Shuffled
strengths: Preserves writes state and update budget
weaknesses: Breaks content address and is not competitive

name: Opposite-Eligibility
strengths: Moves reward credit to the nonexecuted action

name: No-Feedback-Local
strengths: Matches local state and action sampler
selection_reason: Checks whether controller state alone helps

name: Bayes-Reward-Filter
strengths: Uses a registered hazard without true test state
weaknesses: Uses train state labels and potential outcomes
selection_reason: Calibrated comparator for persistent reward evidence

name: Hidden-State-Oracle
weaknesses: Accesses true hidden test state and is undeployable

name: Cosine-ProtoNet
strengths: Standard non-gradient personalization with official implementation
weaknesses: Framewise unless a temporal wrapper is paired
selection_reason: Main published same-backbone reference and paired motif

name: ProtoNet-LITE
paper_title: Memory Efficient Meta-Learning with Large Images
weaknesses: Different training budget prevents paired inference from paper numbers
selection_reason: Strong representation comparison for the next scale step

name: Adaptive-ProtoNet
paper_title: Improving ProtoNet for Few-Shot Video Object Recognition
weaknesses: Published run is not on the Exp34 frozen tape

name: ORBIT-FineTuner
paper_title: ORBIT A Real-World Few-Shot Dataset for Teachable Object Recognition
weaknesses: Mutable parameters and optimization cost differ
selection_reason: Published context and future same-tape rerun

name: LN-Tune
paper_title: Strong Baselines for Parameter-Efficient Few-Shot Fine-Tuning

name: Fixed-Temporal-EMA
strengths: Tests one reusable causal temporal motif
selection_reason: Rules out gains from simply adding any recurrence

name: Instantaneous-Majority
strengths: Uses all four current-frame predictions without state
weaknesses: Still computes the full actuator bank
selection_reason: Separates heterogeneous ensembling from causal belief

name: Memoryless-Consensus
weaknesses: Degenerates to one tie-broken current decision

name: Eight-Frame-Delayed-Consensus
strengths: Preserves the rule while delaying evidence

name: Oracle-Per-Frame
weaknesses: Uses query labels and is never deployable

name: Gated-DeltaNet
paper_title: Gated Delta Networks Improving Mamba2 with Delta Rule
weaknesses: Not an official ORBIT model and requires end-to-end training
selection_reason: Architectural context rather than a current paired baseline
